entry.title: Re: How to scrape images from Google
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski 

I would like to ask to that while using the Download File activity what are you setting as the URL???

And I would like to ask how to achieve this web-scraping images and saving it to the local folder using SAP BTP trial Account since DMS is not available for it.

Thank You
Yashmin Behera

entry.title: Re: class description table
entry.content:
The description of the class is being considered as keywords to the classification object. thus stored in the table SWOR. you can find with internal class number.

so get the CLINT from KLAH, then retrieve the class description from field KSCHL, KSCHG from SWOR Table for respective CLINT and language. #VCJNAVC24

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content: Hi again! Did anyone tried to fetch the planned working time along the recorded working time per specific period? day/month? In Story reporting; I only get wrong values. Please help!

entry.title: Re: How to create and use URL Parameters in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, I've been trying this in a story and I am experiencing the same as Andreas and Dave: it seems, that the target story doesn't read the given URL parameter. Do you have news to this function?

Edit: Solved! In the receiving story, the script variable (which is to be exposed as URL parameter) needs to be named WITHOUT the prefix "p_" and in the sending story, the URL param needs to be created WITH prefix "p_"

entry.title: Re: How to Profit from FAST RFC Serialization
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I have adapted the information on connector support for fast serialization in this weblog:

Fast serialization is available as of NW RFC SDK 7.50, SAP JCo 3.1, SAP NCo 3.1, and Java Connector for SAP Cloud Platform. 

Regards

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Error : Expression "DP1c.D029" cannot be found in the...
entry.content:
For example, I tried to purge the data and delete the variables, to start everything from scratch based just on the design but I still had the same error message.

I suspect that something went wrong during the transfer from preprod environment to production. This matches your hypothesis too.

entry.title: Re: HTTP header issue with S4 API call
entry.content:
Hi Navneet,

It might have been a long time since this issue occurred, and perhaps it was resolved in some way. However, I would like this solution to remain here in case others encounter the same problem. I faced a similar issue as well. I encountered this error in an S/4 Public Cloud system with a standard SAP service. I tried removing the headers, but it didn’t work. I even opened a ticket with SAP support. Eventually, I decided to switch the HTTP protocol I was using to OData, and the problem was resolved.

When using OData, it accepts the data in XML format instead of JSON. If you don't want to use OData, you can split the data item by item and then merge it afterward.

entry.title: Disable linked Invoice and Credit memo clearing while posting payment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We're currently facing an inconsistency while posting a customer payment manually and clearing an invoice in the app "Post incoming payments" (F1345)

We started using the field "Invoice reference" recently for Credit Memos, so that the net due date is the same as the associated invoice.

The inconsistency happens when trying to clear the invoice without the credit memo. Some users can select only the invoice, while others get the invoice and credit memo linked automatically.

I've checked the app "Edit Options for Journal Entries - My Settings" (F2130) and none of the users have the option "Use invoice reference" checked.

 

Do you have knowledge of any other user-specific config. or reason that might cause the different behavior?

 

Thanks in advance,

Best regards

entry.title: Joule Business scenarios - subscriber provider - IAS token issue
entry.content:
We are developing an integration for Joule business scenarios.
Here we are having a subscriber subaccount which communicates with provider subaccount and its Joule app.
We are using IAS based authentication for token exchange between subscriber and provider, facing authentication issue here.
If anyone has any insights or experience building similar integration, please do let us know. If there is any active community regarding this topic, please do let us know.

entry.title: Re: Creating ODATA Draft Scenario for CURD Operations
entry.content:
Thank you Rushitha,
It was helped me alot!

entry.title: Tokenization and chain of custody accounting to transition to certified sustainable materials
entry.content:
The business world is exponentially shifting from linear businesses to circular businesses and at the same time, there is a great emphasis on tracking and tracing of raw materials in the value chain and tagging them back to the source such that, there is visibility into various sustainability aspects like sustainable sourcing practices and product carbon footprints. Apart from the voluntary drive from the businesses, the regulations, for example, EU Deforestation Regulations (companies need to demonstrate that the products are deforestation free) for the companies operating within EU, has brought up keen interest from the investors and the business stakeholders such that businesses are compelled to take necessary actions to be complaint towards the regulations and at the same time attracting investors by getting into limelight for taking such sustainability actions.

Along with tracking and tracing, for industries like metals and mining, and chemicals, chain of custody of the raw materials has been a greater hurdle to achieve the required visibility into production processes and tracing and analyzing the product sources and footprints.

                             The need for transparency and traceability in Supply Chains

To tackle these challenges, SAP has come up with a solution called Green Token, which is a chain of custody accounting tool, which emphasizes on mass balancing and segregated accounting. Green Token helps the customers in tracing and tracking back the raw materials and analyzing the mass balances of the raw materials with the help of Tokenization. Tokenization simply refers as the creation of Tokens whenever any circular/recycled content enters the production process and transfer of those tokens across the production processes whenever the recycled content gets transferred/transformed from one process to another.    

TCS team has envisaged a use case for metal and mining industry (Aluminum) on how SAP Green Token helps in mitigating the challenges pertaining to the industry. To depict this, TCS has taken an end-to-end value chain of aluminum production and carved out the phases at which Tokenization is likely to take place and how the tokens are transferred across the value chain.

                                                    Use Case: Green Token for Aluminum Industry

  1. Initiation of Green Tokens (creation of tokens): At this stage, the recycled content from the recycler enters the production process and to record this transaction there is creation of tokens according to the volume of recycled content entering the process.
  2. Material mass balance: Across the production processes, the mass balance is maintained through transfer of tokens and at each phase the volumes are recorded such that there are no discrepancies.
  3. Final product with Green Tokens: The final product would have the total details about the virgin and recycled content within the form of tokens, which would help the manufacturer to get certified and various material certification agencies.

Apart from metal industry, this additional information would help various industries in better understanding their products’ footprint and would help them in identifying and mitigating any risks pertaining to the auditability of the products origin. The segregated accounting would help manufacturers in enabling the transparency required for the materials which are under the regulations radar across the supply chains. Additional information about the product help customers in choosing the right product and in return increases brand value and customer trust towards the product.

Conclusion

As manufacturers are gearing up to tackle these challenges, TCS, which is a strategic partner of SAP, could help them in tackle these challenges with the help of SAP Green Token. TCS, which is a technology consulting firm, would help manufacturers in setting up the systems, enabling the required data transfers into the systems through data genealogies. Apart from that, TCS team, which has rich experience in sustainability strategy consulting would help the manufacturers in pinpointing the various pain areas and solving out through required use cases and technology enablement.

entry.title: Re: INTRODUCTION TO UNIVERSAL COST ALLOCATION IN SAP S/4HANA (PART II)
entry.content: I really look forward to SAP deciding to enhance this functionality for Product Costing....

entry.title: Get all operations with final confirmation from AFRU
entry.content:
Hi,

We try to find all operations that are tagged with a final confirmation in EAM app. We have data from AFRU. In this table, for same operations, there are multiple records with different RMHL, the records with maxium RMZHL is the latest one? but it might be either canceled or reversed. 

If we need to find the current final confirmation displayed in EAM, is the one with maxium RMZHL, excuding Reversed records (STOKZ = 'X') and Canceled records (STZHL >=1), noticed STZHL has many values, Null, 0, 1, 2, 3,...? the valid records is WHERE STOKZ <> 'X'  AND  (STZHL < 1)? Then final confirmation from the one with max RMZH? if the value is 'X', it is tagged with final confirmation in EAM workorder app?

e.g,

WITH FinalConfirmation AS (
SELECT
AFRU.* -- Include all AFRU fields
FROM AFRU
INNER JOIN (
SELECT
AUFPL, -- Operation plan number
APLZL, -- Sub-operation number
MAX(RMZHL) AS MaxCounter_RMZHL -- Maximum confirmation counter
FROM AFRU
WHERE STOKZ <> 'X' -- Exclude reversed confirmations
AND  (STZHL < 1)-- Exclude canceled confirmations
GROUP BY AUFPL, APLZL
) MaxRMZHL
ON AFRU.AUFPL = MaxRMZHL.AUFPL
AND AFRU.APLZL = MaxRMZHL.APLZL
AND AFRU.RMZHL = MaxRMZHL.MaxCounter_RMZHL
WHERE AFRU.AUERU = 'X' -- Only include final confirmations
);

Also, I’m wondering when operations will be added to the AFRU table. Some operations appear in the table with Processing% = 0, but others are not included at all? 

SAP EAM Work Order

¡Business Builders es una solución gratuita para la comunidad académica! 

Inscríbase y marque su calendario para este taller en línea:

  • Fecha: Jueves 28 de noviembre, 2024
  • Hora: 11 AM UTC-5 (CO, PE, EC);  10 AM MX; 1 PM AR, BR, CL; 5 PM CET

entry.title: Re: Create SAP S/4HANA External GL Account Hierarchy within SAP Datasphere using standard CDS Views
entry.content: @aalbis how have you configured the Hierarchy with Dimension view? Did you define the non-leaf node types, and did you associate this view to the text views for those node types?

entry.title: CMIS -> GOS/DMS are in KPro not in CMIS-Business-Objekt-Folder
entry.content:
Hello,

i configured via DMS integration option a new CMIS repository. See article:

Demystifying Document Management Service on BTP - SAP Community

After adding a new attachement to a Product "208270", the file is saved this succes to hte correct folder patch

/Business Object Types/Product/208270

If I did the same based on a SalesOrder or a DIR the files is still in the KPro area.

DIR -> /Knowledge Provider/DMS_PCD1

SalesOrder -> /Knowledge Provider/SOFFPHIO

In following to blog post describes that the "Knowlegde Provider" path is only temporar.

Document Management Integration API | SAP Help Portal

"In DMS, when you create a document info record, a corresponding CMIS folder gets created in the repository. When you add files in document info records, CMIS documents are initially created in the KPro folder (DMS_PCD1). Eventually these documents get moved to the corresponding CMIS business object folder ‘DocumentInfoRecord’."

Second one:

SAP CMIS Profile | SAP Help Portal

  • Knowledge Provider (KPro):

    • The KnowledgeProvider folder is placed under the root node. The folders inside the KPro folder hold the files until they are moved to their corresponding business object type folders.

    • The draft attachments, irrespective of whether they are DMS or GOS based, are first stored in the Knowledge Provider folder. On saving, the attachments are moved to the respective folders under the Business Object Types folder depending on whether they are DMS or GOS based attachments.

      For example, files for DMS and GOS will be created under the PhioClass DMS_PCD1 and SOFFPHIO folders respectively under the main Knowledge Provider folder."

For me following is not clear:

- Create attachment to a Product the file is saved in the correct area "/Business Object Types/Product/208270" and for the other Business objects like SalesOrder and DIR it still stay in the "Knowledge Provider" area.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: Making Script Objects as global
entry.content:
@SandeepAtmakuru 

Currently the scope of script variable and objects is only current story or application run time. 

Hopefully we might have a real global variables/methods/objects in future.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Inquiry About Default Sorting Order for accounts.sear...
entry.content:
@MA57 wrote:

I hope this message finds you well Partner Hours Starbucks

I am currently working with the accounts.search API in SAP Customer Data Cloud, and I would like to inquire about the default sorting order of the results when the order by clause is not specified. Could you please clarify what the default order is, and whether it is consistent across different implementations?

Hi there!
Thankyou for reaching out. When the order by clause is not specified in the accounts.search API of SAP Customer Data Cloud, the results are typically returned in the order they are stored in the database, which may not be consistent across different implementations or environments.
To ensure consistent and predictable results, it's best to always specify an order by clause in your queries.

Does this help clarify things for you?

entry.title: Position with item category OPHU in the EWM delivery remains in the ECC queue with the error.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m facing the following issue: In the decentralized EWM, we create a packing item (OPHU), which is supposed to update the delivery in ECC by adding the new item upon confirmation. However, the data record gets stuck in the queue (ECC inbound) with the error "Item 0020 does not exist."

What puzzles me is that the new items are not listed in NEW_ITEM_DATA but rather under ITEM_DATA.

Can anyone help with this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Fiscal Representative and Plant Abroad in SAP S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

In SAP ECC we have this Concept of 'Fiscal Representative and Plant Abroad'.

In SAP S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition, I guess 'RITA' is the equivalent process for Plant Abroad but for the Fiscal Representative we are not able to identify any similar process or relevant configuration in SAP Cloud.

So, is there any equivalent process or configurations for Fiscal Representative in SAP Public Cloud and if not, what Alternative solution exist for this scenario in Cloud?

Thank You,

Amar Modanwal.

I don't think the issue is with universe as we tried the same with free hand sql connection and its the same result

entry.title: Re: SAP 4.3 SP05 Report fetches data of current system da...
entry.content: Hi Jay,

entry.title: Re: SAC script to obtain Story Folder
entry.content:
@IGadhia 

not sure if there is an API to return you the folder path. But if the idea is to make sure if the user is opening the story from the approved folder and not their own saved copies, you could try the getInfo() of Application which return Application information and this will be different for one in approved folder and one in user folder.

https://help.sap.com/doc/1639cb9ccaa54b2592224df577abe822/release/en-US/index.html#Application_MgetInfo

 

Nikhil

entry.title: From carbon counting to carbon accounting – end-to-end carbon management with SAP
entry.content: Join our virtual live session to explore how SAP Green Ledger is revolutionizing sustainability reporting and management by combining financial and carbon accounting at the business transaction level with SAP S/4HANA Cloud. With this ERP-centric approach to carbon accounting, SAP Green Ledger not only makes carbon traceable and auditable but goes beyond compliance and provides environmental impact alongside financial impact data for strategic and operational decision making at the point of time when business decisions are taken. Don't miss this opportunity to learn about the future of sustainable business!

entry.title: Re: SAP 4.3 SP05 Report fetches data of current system date instead of prompt date in first instance
entry.content: Hi Jay, this looks like custom SQL prepared in Webi. Are all your reports prepared in this manner? If so, edit the SQL to remove the to_date coding and re-test? regards, James

entry.title: New Course on Putting AI Ethics into Practice at SAP
entry.content:
In this free course, you’ll learn the importance and principles of AI ethics, how SAP set up an ethics governance framework, and which rules SAP employees need to follow during the development, deployment, use, and sale of AI systems. Join the discussion group. You can only do this until Tuesday, December 10, 2024, so don´t miss this great opportunity to interact with other participants.

Explore here: Putting AI Ethics into Practice at SAP

Best regards
Sabine Wissner

(SAP Learning Team)

entry.title: Re: add equipment tab
entry.content:
Please Refer help document 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_plan_dispatch/modal-ui-equipment-service-call.html?q=Equipment

entry.title: Re: Both "Inactive" and "Active" are set to "No"; set at...
entry.content:
You must first find the business partners where both fields ("Inactive" and "Active") were set to "No":

SELECT "CardCode" FROM OCRD WHERE "validFor"='N' AND "frozenFor"= 'N'

Then you have to set the "Active" field (OCRD.validFor) to YES for all these GPs (via DTW import or manually in the SAP BO client (first remove the Active check mark and then set it again)). 

You can then update the email address via DTW.

entry.title: Re: Making Script Objects as global
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Re: RAP : Error for Action with Deep Table Parameter - Metadata and Service Binding fails
entry.content: @tobias_bock We are on 2023 / Basis 758 (on-prem) and yet I still get the same error. Did SAP perhaps say if they support this only in the S/4 Cloud offerings?

entry.title: Re: Getting Timeout Error when adding a S4 HANA system in...
entry.content:
"no connect of TP sapdp01" -- is this is true, then that would mean that your SAP system is in deep trouble?! The dispatcher is not running. But then nobody would be able to log on to that system! Can you log on successfully with SAPGUI using the same logon parameters as you entered in AiE?

But more likely I would guess, that there is no SAP system running on 10.53.252.5, only a standalone gateway. In that case, you would need to tell the gateway, where the real SAP system (the application servers) are running, e.g.

GWHOST=10.53.252.5, ASHOST=<IP of app-server you want to logon to>

You will have to check this with your SAP system administrators.

entry.title: Re: remote enabled function module to read material configuration on plant level
entry.content:
Hello Holger,

you are asking the wrong people... We from NW RFC SDK are responsible for the technical aspects of the RFC communication protocol, but we do not know all of the  probably millions of remote-enabled function modules, that exist in an SAP System...!

You should tag your question with the tag of the application, you want to use here (Material Management?). Then experts from that application area will notice the question, and perhaps they know, which FM you could use.

Best Regards, Ulrich

entry.title: S/4HANA for Product Compliance - labelling follow up questions
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Following up from the detailed question and answers from this post, I have additional questions

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/s-4-product-compliance-label-management/qaq-p/13859930

- Can this standard product compliance module support labels that are not necessarily related to hazards? My customer will have various labels related to the product, which includes hazardous shipping labels, but also logistic labels that contains the batch number and barcode for example. Is it technically possible to assign these labels as a category so that all labels - hazardous and non-hazardous - can be accessed in one same app? 

- Am I right in assuming that as standard there is only one Product stewardship role that is required in order to access the labels? we will have logistics members who need to select labels to print. If not available as standard then I assume we will need to develop custom roles?

- How is information such as bar codes supported? Is this taken elsewhere in SAP as standard?

entry.content:
Hi arshadali1971,

Can you post the script so i can advise.

Thanks 

Brad

entry.title: SQL Console (ADT) fires additional query which takes a long time to execute
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm executing in SQL Console following script:

 

select ds~vbeln, dh~kunnr, dh~kunag, p~parnr
from likpuk as ds
join likp as dh on dh~vbeln = ds~vbeln
left join vbpa as p on p~vbeln = ds~vbeln and p~posnr = '000000' and p~parvw = 'RE'
where dh~erdat  >= '20240101'
  and dh~kunnr > '0000000000'
  and dh~kunag > '0000000000'

 

Looks like very simple, isn't it. 😉

But the SQL console don't execute just mine query (noticed in ST05). No, it wants first to count the rows! 😲Why?

And that kind of inquiry costs 35 seconds every time, as you can see below:

Is there a way to avoid this SELECT COUNT(*)?

ADT team please respond if possible? Placing a ticket to you is still a mystery to me. 🔮

Regards,
Nemanja

entry.title: Re: Inter Company STO Process in S/4 HANA
entry.content: Hi @nir_2024 check Define Shipping Data for Plants and make sure data correctly maintained.

entry.title: How to dynamically configure a RemoteService destination timeout?
entry.content:
I know I can configure the destination object in BTP or set a requestTimeout in cdsrc.json for the destination.
But my usecase requires several timeouts based on endpoint or usage of said endpoint.

I've looked and I cannot see a way to pass this timeout somehow in the cds.connect.to('destination').send() method, is there a way to pass it in on a per request basis?

If I were to use the cloud sdk to perform these operations will that be traced/instrumented?
Do you guys have an example of such usecase out in the wild?

entry.title: HRIS Sync Mapping Guidelines
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

In HRIS Sync, is it acceptable to map multiple standard fields to a single HRIS field? So that a single HRIS field data is transmitted to multiple standard fields. In the below example, considering the emplStatus is already hardcoded, can we have below custom mapping to a custom field. I think yes.

Also are there any limitations that prevent mapping one standard element and one user info element together? For example, below: 

I have referred to a few SAP notes and help documentation, but the statements are often contradicting.

entry.title: Re: What You Need to Know About Blogging Post-Migration
entry.content: Hi @anne-petteroe, thanks for letting me know! I thought the co-authors feature wasn't working as it should, but maybe this has been improved by now. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: What's the latest on Armenian localization for SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hi Dennis,

Currently there is no standard support for Armenian localization in SAP S/4HANA. However, the local partners are working on it to provide such option for local customers. For more details you can contact SAP representative in Armenia, Valeri Sargsyan via +37455659185, valeri.sargsyan@sap.com. 

Kind regards,

Tsovinar

entry.title: Re: Bom Explosion report Issue
entry.content:
STLAL is an IMPORTING field in the function module so you can designate which alternative BOM to explode.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: How to apply metadata patch in SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content: @Arunachalam Good One. It's easier when we have to share steps with new MDK developers.

entry.title: Re: Error : Expression "DP1c.D029" cannot be found in the...
entry.content:
try to remove objects step by step and refresh the data,
at some point the error is gone and you can see your problem

entry.title: Linking of activities and milestones in Project System on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I had a few questions regarding Project System in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (specific for construction project):

1) Can we link activities (or child WBS) to milestones in a project with revenue created in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

2) Can we bill the client as per the completed project milestone? I can see that milestones can be created separately in the project and in the sales order, but can these be linked?

3) Can we create a mass project demand? I can create a demand for a single material/service, but I need the functionality to create activity-wise mass demand.

4) Is there any functionality to create and maintain a bill of quantities, say, for a construction project? Said bill of quantities should be available during project planning.

5) In case of a scenario where construction material needs to be transferred from one project site to another, can the material be transferred across the assigned WBS?

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: $batch process to delete single or multiple Vendor fr...
entry.content:
Hi @Rohan_Chauhan ,

Could you please check if the records are deleted - despite the response message?
HTTP 202 is a successful response, you can read about HTTP responses here.

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: How do I create a coa assignment with same material number and different profiles.
Re: Post request to /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product is returning XML instead of JSON
entry.content:
Hi @frankrosales ,

Have you tried posting Accept: application/json HTTP Header in your request?
Could you share how does you request URL looks like after you add the format query parameter?

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: sap cap unbound action with conditions as input
entry.content: As I see condition consists of a dropdown with values equal to, contains, etc. and an input text, which you can add in your custom dialog.

entry.title: Re: How to use TCODES in WEBGUI
entry.content: go to settings - visualization- enable ok code . this will give you boxto enter the t code for webgui

entry.title: Re: SQL Console (ADT) fires additional query which takes a long time to execute
entry.content: I could imagine that the query itself also tooks a huge amount of time. Have you think about adding indexes to your tables?

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba
entry.content:
Webinar: SAP Ariba Category Management - implementation guidance for SAP partners

  • Date: 12 Dec 2024
  • Time: (10 - 11) AM, America/New York
  • Registration Link

This session will explore how SAP Ariba Category Management can streamline processes, provide actionable market intelligence, and offer consistent frameworks for developing and operationalizing category strategies. Attendees will learn about the key features, including in-depth data insights, and guided strategy development.

entry.title: Re: Enhanced RISE with SAP Methodology with clean core quality checks
entry.content: Is it mandatory to use SAP Cloud ALM to implement this methodology?

entry.title: Request: codejam on Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core in the Netherlands
entry.content: We have hosted several codejams before on a variety of topics, last year with Nico Schoenteich on Flexible proramming model. Now we would like organise an codejam on 'Generative AI Hub & SAP AI Core', which is listed as one the topics. We are located in the Netherlands, Utrecht region. Possible dates are ideally Q1 2025. Could you pick up this request? Thanks! Wim

entry.title: Cost Center Master data load from BW to BPC
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing issue Cost center master data load from BW to BPC. 

  I am trying to validate the Transformation file of Cost center master data getting below error messages:

    Error Found in system

    Error in Admin module or a component used by admin module

  Dimension member is a n invalid member ID in dimension COST_CENTER.

Please suggest the solution.

Thanks, Rao.

entry.title: Re: SAP Best Practices process content for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have few questions about adapting sap best practice process content in CALM.

is it possible to copy a diagram from SAP Signavio into custom process or copying a solution process flow to a custom process. Is this achievable ?

However, I see a option to "copy  diagram " in the solution process scope.

Regards,

Satish

entry.title: Re: [BTP Security Latest]: How to Get Current Logged-on User Details in SAP Business Technology Plat
entry.content:
Hi,

I am also facing same issue(404 not found) while accessing BTP deployed UI5 app from Build work zone advanced.

Please suggest, if found any solution.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF REGEX
entry.content:
The net value is $29000.00.

However, in order to see Net value = 2,9000.00, I used the replace syntax as described below.

REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF REGEX '(\d)(?=(\d{3})+(\.|$))' IN lv_formatted_amount
WITH '$1,'.

entry.title: Re: Problem using Business Object Interface in Action RAP
entry.content: Hello s4clearning, the first point can be answered with "yes, this is the way it currently works". Can you please share more details on the second point? Kind regards, Karsten

entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In the new BP model i tried to synchronize business partner with HCM data using report 

/SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE

The employee role was able to be created but for the BP with employment role 

I'm not sure which date was the employment pulled, as i haven't maintained any record with .00.0000 date

 

Thank you

entry.content: Hello @richyrich maybe is interested!

entry.title: Re: Database Table getting updated after triggering an Idoc
entry.content:
If not yet saved to database, the address should be available in memory of function group SZA0, did you alread try to

  • Assign this data from main program of function group (e.g. itab IADRC of SAPLSZA0) 
  • Or find an FM of the group that read this data

entry.title: PI 7.5 - How to add Parameters to a REST Receiver (method POST)
entry.content:
In SAP PI I know if a part of the URL is dynamic then i can enter a variable in the URL string, for example {userid}. Then I enter a Pattern Variable Replacement for this field. No problem.

My issue is now, that I have a URL which has Parameters and I am not sure how to add this to the REST Receiver. With Pattern Variable Replacement it doesn't work. 

In SoapUI, the Parameters are separate i.e. not part of the URL string and this works i.e.:

One cannot however include the parameters in the URL it doesn't work:

So, the question is how does one build this into a REST Receiver channel in PI 7.5?

All help greatly appreciated. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Behavior of Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation after Clearing
entry.content:
Hello Kevin,

I have a query about statistical posting in the fx run after clearing.
is there a possibility to not make this entry.

We also see if exchange rate is not considered for clearing ie invoice and payment is made with same local currency amount and realization is at time of bank statement, then this statistical posting does not make sense.

Thanks,

Anoop

entry.title: Re: Enhanced RISE with SAP Methodology with clean core quality checks
entry.content: Yes. And it is already included in the RISE entitlements ...

Hello

With 2411, you can copy analytics stories.

2411 - Enhancements for Preconfigured Analytics Stories

Best Regards,

V

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hey Brandon! 
Let's catch each other. 
We have the new york group and we can meet here at the big apple ! 😄

I'm writing you in the chat

entry.title: Display custom logic from abap program into cds view
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I am working on a cds view which displays all the selected fields via a fiori elements preview. I have an abap program that calculates some custom fields as such:

REPORT z_outstanding_days.

DATA: lt_swwwihead TYPE TABLE OF swwwihead,
      ls_swwwihead TYPE swwwihead,
      lv_days_outstanding TYPE i,
      lv_current_date TYPE d.

* Get the current date
lv_current_date = sy-datum.

* Select data from SWWWIHEAD table
SELECT * FROM swwwihead INTO TABLE lt_swwwihead WHERE wi_stat = 'READY'.

* Loop through the selected work items
LOOP AT lt_swwwihead INTO ls_swwwihead.
  * Calculate the number of days outstanding
  lv_days_outstanding = lv_current_date - ls_swwwihead-crdate.

  * Print the work item ID and the number of days outstanding
  WRITE: / 'Work Item ID:', ls_swwwihead-wi_id,
           'Days Outstanding:', lv_days_outstanding.
ENDLOOP.

How can I pull the custom calculated field from the abap program into the following CDS view

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZV_OUTSTANDING_ITEMS'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Outstanding Work Items with Approvers'
define view ZV_OutstandingItems as select from swwwihead
  LEFT OUTER join swwuserwi on swwwihead.wi_id = swwuserwi.wi_id
{
  key swwwihead.wi_id,
  swwwihead.crdate,
  swwwihead.wi_text,
}

entry.title: Re: OUT NOW: SAP Signavio November 2024 release

Hello,

do you have any manual at hand to perform the configuration for this topic?

Provide to-be process model from SAP Signavio to SAP Cloud ALM

By default I have no button like transfer to Cloud ALM available in Signavio.

Thanks

Christian

Hi all,

Appreciate your quick response.

Regards,

Srinivas

entry.title: Re: Maintain Same invoicing party for 2 vendor codes
entry.content: So you're planning to set up both plants as suppliers, sharing the same billing partner, which should do the trick.

entry.title: Re: Post request to /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product is returni...
entry.content:
As @catano pointed out in his comment, the POST request was missing the header: 

Accept: application/json

That solved the issue.

entry.title: Re: How to add custom menu button in the object page head...
entry.content: example for v4 FE.

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: cancelamento extemporâneo de documento NF-e
entry.content:
Juliana, tudo bem?

O cancelamento extemporâneo ocorre somente para notas aprovadas no SVC? Para notas que foram aprovadas pelo ambiente normal (não pelo SVC) é só fazer o mesmo procedimento?

entry.title: Re: EAM Phase Model Conditions for Subphases in S/4HANA 2023
entry.content: Nick, Excellent information, thanks!

entry.title: Re: ME22N Delivery Date Mass change for STO/PO
entry.content:
It won't be at all easy to simulate the article drop-down box (AFAIK no menu option for 'go to item')

  • My original 'You've already been lucky that the Batch-Input works on ME22n, which is an Enjoy transaction...' was too optimistic - 217437 - ME21N/ME51N: Batch input and CATT not possible still apply
  • I would personally use BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL1 followed by BAPI_PO_CHANGE and BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT.

entry.title: CQC Custom Code Maintainability Check
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We would like to request a CCMC (Custom Code Maintainability Check) audit of our SAP system as per this document available here for SAP Enterprise Support:

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/support/en_us/library/ssp/offerings-and-programs/sap-enterprise-support/enterprise-support-academy/continuous-quality-check-improvement-services/issapccmc.pdf

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CQC Custom Code Maintainability Check
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for your inquiry about the CQC Custom Code Maintainability Check. I would like to clarify that this service is not directly delivered by SAP. Instead, it is a self-service tool that you can use to ensure the quality and maintainability of your custom code.

The Custom Code Maintainability Check is a part of the Continuous Quality Check (CQC) for Custom Code SAP. This tool is designed to help you identify potential issues in your custom code that could affect its maintainability. It checks for various factors such as complexity, testability, robustness, efficiency, and changeability. By identifying these issues early, you can take steps to improve the quality of your code and reduce the risk of future problems.

The CQC for Custom Code SAP is a continuous process that involves regularly checking your custom code to ensure it meets the necessary quality standards. This process can help you reduce the total cost of ownership (TCO) of your custom code by identifying and addressing issues early, before they become more serious and costly to fix.

To use the Custom Code Maintainability Check, you will need to have the necessary permissions and access to the SAP Solution Manager. From there, you can run the check on your custom code and view the results in a detailed report.

1330674 - SAP Custom Code Maintainability Check - SAP for Me

CQC Custom Code Maintainability Check (CCMC)

When to use:

  • The custom code maintainability check is a quality assurance check for an implementation project with focus on future maintainability and upgradeability of your SAP software solution.
  • When customization code is increasing total cost of operation.
  • When a significant upgrade is planned.

Scope and Deliverable:

The findings and recommendations are described in a detailed service report with below information:

  • Transparent documentation of all objects in a custom development project
  • Categorization of these objects into modified SAP objects, enhancements, customer objects and referenced SAP objects
  • Determination of key figures, indicating the upgradeability and maintainability of customer’s system
  • Benchmarking of these figures against average values of custom development projects
  • Analysis of the software change management

Should you require further information on Custom Code Maintainability Check and Continuous Quality Check (CQC) for Custom Code SAP, we kindly ask you to open a case under the following component: SV-SMG-SER.

entry.title: Re: SAP 4.3 SP05 Report fetches data of current system date instead of prompt date in first instance

entry.title: Re: Changing data does'nt reflect in UPDAT and UPTIM fields
entry.content: To confirm a change go to FK08 (it has to be a different user that the one who did the change/s).

entry.title: Re: Collection of String in deep entity model
entry.content: what problem?

entry.title: Quality notification and Internal order link
entry.content:
Hello,

The process is following: Purchase order for raw material > Goods receipt on Quality stock > Create Quality notification (QM) for damaged product.

In QM notification we have costs for damaged product and it is fine. But also we need costs "others", which are not related to material.

For this purpose I can create statistical Internal order via Follow-up action in QM notification.

But the problem is that I can not find any link between QM notification and Internal order. Only what we have is QM notification ID in the description of Internal order. Do we have any link on tables level?
